titleStmt.title: SII 25.157: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 157. (A.R. No. 157 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.
This incomplete inscription commences with the Sanskrit verse Ētad = viśva-nṛipa-śrēṇi, etc., followed by the king's historical introduction Tirumagaḷ-ōla, etc.

It records an oral order (tiruvāymoḻind-aruḷa) of the king issued to the Śrīkāryam officer and to those who are looking after the various services in the temple who inturn got the orders engraved for the grant of 52 vēli of land made in a village (name not clear) in Arumoḻidēvavaḷanāḍu, a dēvadāṉa of the god of the temple of Arumoḻidēva-Īśvaramnāyanār in Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu, to provide for the food-offerings to the deities Maṇaliṅgadēvar and Anavadyadēvar, probably of the above temple. The details of food-offerings made and the apportionment of the rice for each services in the temple are given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Etat viśvanṛpaśeṇimelṛḷimālo
palāḷitam . śāsanam rājarājasya rā[jakesarivarma]ṇaḥ
śrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilaccelviyum
taṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷa kā
ḷurccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭum
kaṅkapāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyum nu
ḷampapāṭiyum kuṭamalai nāṭum kollamu
m kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇ
ṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉ
ṟi taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa tanneḻil vaḷaruḻiyuḷḷellām
toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecu koḷ ko
rājarāja kesari panmarāna śrī rājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu
kṣatriyaśikhāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyāṟṟu
Arumoḻiteva Īśvarattuttevar tevatāṉam Arumoḻiteva vaḷanāṭṭu
ma lai vāyil nilam Aimpattiruveli Uṭaiyār śrī rājarāja
tevar tiruvāymoḻin=taruḷa devarkaḷ śrīkāryyaṅkaḷu maṟṟum pala
nivateṅkaḷu mārāykinṟa tiruvaiyāṟṟu mummuṭi civabhaṭāraṉ
taḷiyākiya Arumoḻiteva Īśvarattukkuk kalveṭṭi mu muḷḷiṭṭa
yil nivan=tañ ceytapaṭi . maṇaliṅka tevarkku Oru potukkut tiruvamirtu
yāka muṉṟu potaikkarici kuṟuṇi nānāḻiyum Anavadya devarkku muṉṟu
arici 3 Iruvar tevarkku maddhyajāmattukkarici 9m Āka nāḷoṉṟiṉu
kku Aiñciraṇṭu vaṇṇam neḷa Ā100m Oru tevarkkuk kaṟiyamirtu
ya puḻukkuk kaṟi 1 porikkaṟika ĀkaThis word is expressed by symbol.Iruvar tevarkkum kaṟiyamirtu
kku veṇṭu meka neḷam Iruvar tevarkku maddhyajāmaṅka
tukku neḷa Iruvar teva(r)rkkum neyyamirtu potāḻākkāka mu
potaikku kuḻakkarai Agnikāryyattukkum porikkaṟiyamirtukkum
taikkuc ceviṭaraiyāka munṟu potaikkum neyāḻākke I
Āviṉ ne Iruceviṭaraikku neḷa m Iruvar te
taikku teyiramirtu Āka muṉṟu potaikkut tayir �
kkukku Aṭaikkāyamirtu munṟu potaikku
Iruvar tevarkkuThe rest of the record is damaged.
Digital edition of SII 25.157 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
